message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant subject
participant blockchain
participant issuer

subject ->> blockchain: look up issuer DID
blockchain ->> subject: issuer public key
subject ->> blockchain: encrypt request with issuer public key
blockchain ->> subject: sign request with subject private key
subject ->> blockchain: request credential
blockchain ->> issuer: look up subject DID
issuer ->> blockchain: subject public key
blockchain ->> issuer: validate request signature
issuer ->> blockchain: decrypt request with issuer private key
issuer ->> blockchain: validate facts of requested credential
issuer ->> blockchain: create Verified Credential (VC)
issuer ->> blockchain: sign VC with issuer private key
blockchain ->> issuer: verified credential
issuer ->> subject: store credential
@enduml
